tech_news.description: Fetch top 5 trending stories from HackerNews API and return title and URL as a clean, readable list

web_scraper.description: Scrape a website URL to extract details. Set query parameter to extract specific intel.

web_search.description: Search the web for real-time information, news, facts, prices, scores, anything current

workspace_manager.description: Manage workspaces and focus modes. Actions: enable_focus, disable_focus.

youtube_audio_downloader.description: Download YouTube audio as MP3 using yt-dlp

youtube_summarizer.description: Summarize any YouTube video — paste the URL and get key points

api_caller.description: Call any REST API using GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with optional headers and payload.

code_runner.description: Write and execute Python code in sandbox with auto pip dependency installs

daily_briefing.description: Generate a smart daily briefing: unread emails, pending tasks, notes, and weather — delivered as one clean summary.

desktop_automation.description: Hands-free OS control: click, type, press keys, hotkeys, scroll. Requires enabling autopilot first.

drive.description: List, search, read, create, download locally, and upload files in Google Drive

file_manager.description: Create, read, edit, list, delete files inside your workspace

gmail.description: Read inbox, send/draft emails, read full threads, search — full email management

google_tasks.description: Add, list, complete, delete tasks in Google Tasks — for future reminders and named to-do items

image_generator.description: Generate an image unconditionally from a text prompt using Pollinations AI.

meta_developer.description: Advanced tool for Aether to evolve its own capabilities. Can list, read, create, or delete other tools. Allows for zero-downtime evolution.

notes.description: Create, read, search and manage personal notes with tags

playwright_agent.description: Headless browser agent to interact with JS-rendered sites, click buttons, fill forms, and extract content.

scheduler.description: Schedule reminders and recurring tasks — one-time or repeating

screen_reader.description: See and describe what's currently on screen — ask questions about screen content

spotify_controller.description: A tool to pause or play music via the Spotify Web API

system_control.description: Control system: open apps, sysinfo, volume, brightness, screenshot, lock, empty_trash, mute_mic, unmute_mic
